title: Sh@lomoh #8010
definition:
Solomon = "peace"

 1) son of David by Bathsheba and 3rd king of Israel; author of
    Proverbs and Song of Songs
nasbUsage:
Definition: Solomon = "peace"

 1) son of David by Bathsheba and 3rd king of Israel; author of
    Proverbs and Song of Songs

    NASB:  Davids son and successor to his throne
